raw_text: If you cancel the order, a cancellation fee will be charged, even if the order was placed due to a technical glitch by Blinkit. Additionally, if they cancel your order after waiting for 20-30 minutes, they still do not have any problem. And when the refund comes, it is uncertain.

Blinkit is good but the delivery person was very rude and unprofessional during my order. They spoke disrespectfully and made the delivery experience unpleasant. I request that this issue be looked into so it doesn't happen again."

Worst delivery app. First they accept the order, their delivery partner pick the order, then they cancel the order and also they show something else on their app and delivers something else. I ordered Happilo premium seedless green raisins packs of 250gm each but they send packs of 200gm each. Now, they are not resolving my problem

this app is not good at all... handling fees are high and not exact everytime you order something(5-50rs) aside from that extra charges (around 40rs for no reason)if you order something even above 100rs you'll realise you are paying 50-70rs extra for no reason....this app needs to stop charging extra....this app rarely allows cash on delivery too and glitches dont allow you to place order sometimes....

Don't download tthe app , service is worthless, a reply takes 2 to 3 hrs The product i ordered is going to expire in 10 days and due to that i asked replacement this was their reply Upon careful review of our records and a detailed examination during the delivery process, we can confirm that the concern item in your recent order is well within its shelf life, ensuring it can be safely used without any worries. Hence, we are unable to create a replacement, redelivery or initiate a refund.

Very disappointing experience with Blinkit. I received a ₹1,500 product that was already opened and damaged. Even though the product has a 7-day replacement policy, Blinkit refused to help and simply said, "We can't help you with this." What's the point of a replacement policy if it's not honored? Unacceptable customer service.

Worst customer support ever, I had ordered a bottle and got a scratched one, I had complained on the app, only computerised messages and when I mailed them, after all proof they called that they will schedule my replacement the next day but no contact later and I wasn't contacted for exchanging the damaged product and no replacement scheduled

fake brands and fake products poor Quality, fake brand I have ordered a fast charger and when I used it's not a fast charging product it's is a very slow charging and it charges only 1% in half an hour don't purchase totally waste of money and time when I talk with a customer executive they said it will not be returned the issue is not in the system you must connect with the brand.

Firstly the order was not getting placed then after some time it showed due to higher demand delivery is unavailable at my location then again after sometime suddenly multiple orders has been confirmed upon cancelling the duplicate orders cancellation charges is also added for my next order very disappointed with this type of app issue

Worst experience with Blinkit. I placed a bulk order, but it was split into multiple deliveries. The delivery guy has no scanner and demanded cash. I wanted to pay online because i didn't have cash at that time. Instead of resolving the issue, your representative (a lady) cancelled my order without our permission. This is completely unacceptable. I have uninstalled the Blinkit app and lost trust in your service. I will also share my experience with friends and family.

worst app. l had ordered one order and the order placed 3 times due to app glitch and later on tried to cancel those order but it wasn't and at the end delivery partner took it and when I asked him shall I give you money he refused l fell very bad.

btw it's a good app for quick online shopping...but there's something which I don't like... whenever I choose cash on delivery, the parcel delivery is on time...and when I pay first then it takes so much time to deliver like more than hour...as if they don't care

Beware of misleading product images. Bought mattress for ₹1174. Photos showed large size. Delivered product was way smaller. Raised complaint - Blinkit refused refund saying policy doesn't allow. Case closed without resolution. As a customer I feel cheated. improve transparency.

My payment is done but order not placed. Now the chat with us option is not entertaining queries and says because of temporary surge, support is unavailable There is no email address also where we can complain. Highly disappointing

I'm frustrated with the location pop up each and every single damn time I open the app, I don't want to turn on my location all the time if I've already given you my delivery address. If you don't fix this issue then I'm gonna use other apps.

I'm quite satisfied with the app, but recently I've relocated my house ,2 km away from where i used to live and unfortunately,blinkit is not serviceable here, kind of disappointed because this was the only app which was serviceable in my area. so blinkit, please expand your area of services in jaipur, its a humble request.

Extremely unprofessional service. The delivery was severely delayed, wasting my valuable time. To top it off, the delivery rider cancelled the order from their end without delivering. This is completely unacceptable. While I have received the update that my refund will be credited by the 3-4 day

Love to shop on blinkit. lots of variety, offers and fast delivery. My preferred app. Packing needs improvement,chips packs are flat, snacks are crushed inside packs sometimes. Carrots are still horrible. Meat was stinking as it was not stored at right temperatures. Pls improve. Still only Blinkit for me. Delivery persons are very polite and smooth. Tq

Don't use this app. This app is totally fraud they send defective/ tampered products and then denies for refund or exchange even after giving the evidence. Their 'need help' centre at their app is also very annoying, first and ai will talk to you and then it will assign you a support executive and that executive after wasting your time would impose decision on you and without asking that whether you are satisfied with the decision or not....I want to tell more but word limit is not allowing me

The rate and price of the productd are on the mrp, means there is no discount at all but if you need it in 10 to 15 minutes so it is great. Just i want blinkit to work on the discount and prices to be low. But the products and the policy of 10 to 15 minutes is great. i really appreciate. thankyou! 😊
